description: Org-wide Renovate policy for all newstack-cloud repos, independent of any product (Bluelink, Celerity, ...). Extended via github>newstack-cloud/renovate-config. Renovate owns version updates; Dependabot is kept for security updates only. Product-specific rules (e.g. the Bluelink release cascade) live in product-scoped presets, NOT here.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security PRs are handled by Dependabot, not Renovate — avoid duplicate alerts.

packageRules.description: Auto-merge low-risk third-party updates once CI passes.
Hold major updates for manual review.
GitHub Actions: mirror the existing ci(deps) commit convention.
